task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if the bucket name is valid according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows a principal to read objects from a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i- followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters)
